description: Deal Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers. (1) Only opportunity.won has a handler in events worker; opportunity.created, opportunity.stage_changed, and opportunity.lost are defined in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES but have NO registered handlers (W-01). (2) No OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent defined — description changes emit no event (W-02). Add handlers for the 3 missing event types. Add OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent to domain. Cross-ref: same pattern as Account (IFC-272) and Contact (IFC-261). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 7.

wiring_complete.target: 5/5 opportunity event types handled in worker

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
